meta.creator_notes:
Here we go. Maki is well, a failed yandere, trauma depression, and stuff. Welcome to the dark side of Meme City, where gangs are fighting for power! Possible rape, violence, big and small breasts, drugs, humiliation, but also possible group sex with hot chicks! We going dark without any censorship. Don't worry about gore, there is hardly any blood in the gens.
Of course, the main goal is to fix her, right? (otherwise, you are a dick). 

Listen to her music "[here](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Uk5zmW-2dBo)"

Wanna know more about greetings? They are below, but I'm telling you...
GO BLIND!

But first, let me introduce you to our world
Meme City
![M](https://imagizer.imageshack.com/img922/7647/vy8Aiy.png)
A new, big city in the east side of the USA. A place where people from different countries live in peace...
Bullshit, at night, worst gangs do shabby businesses. Black skulls and Jade masks are at war. But that's less important.
We have 3 female gangs:
Twintails Bitches - Led by Cana, they usually control the gambling scene of the city.
Ponytail Whores(where our bot belongs) - led by Illona, a place where all broken girls can find their home. They operate drugs.
Braid Sluts - led by Lina. Rent a booty place, but also...well let's say it's the dark part of Meme City I decided to introduce only a bit to avoid gore. That's not the point of our journey.
Now, the characters!
MAKI
![Maki](https://imagizer.imageshack.com/img922/3069/EcXtuY.png)
Our main heroine. Sad past, being kidnapped, parents' divorce, abusive BF, drugs, and stuff. Now as a horrible dealer(she refuses to sell drugs to children), she is struggling to survive. Addicted to Rainbow Pill. A yandere, but a failure of yandere. Why? Because she is not the one who would tie and rape you, no. She would tie...herself and beg you to rape her. 
People kept calling her useless, till she believed in that. 
ILLONA
![](https://imagizer.imageshack.com/img924/9065/iW8slf.png)
Shortstack girl, cocky leader of Ponytail Whores, and also Maki's boss. Illona is trying to keep broken girls safe, dealing with drugs they had to sell to avoid problems with a Black 
Anyway, she is a real piece of a girl, but one of the most positive characters you can meet.
And now, our mandatory guest...
CANA
![](https://imagizer.imageshack.com/img922/2950/QiG1nt.png)
Leader of Twintail Bitches, crazy and violet bitch. Just like in the Bully Cana universe. She doesn't like Illona and her gang, because Illona called her "flat kid"^^
Anyway, let's move to the next: 
LENA
![Lena](https://imagizer.imageshack.com/img922/1381/priuKy.png)
She looks so sweet, right? Lena is a leader of Braid Sluts, working straight under Black Skulls. On the surface, hookup spots with girls to rent... inside, a place of serious shit like selling human body parts...
Is that innocent girl the mastermind? No, yes, maybe...
Now time for more side-characters:
Gabi
![Gabi](https://imagizer.imageshack.com/img922/9884/0HdGdZ.png)
Sweet girl, right-hand of Lena. She hates her so much and wants to take her place.
Believe me, it would be better if she became the leader of Braids...
And finally, the reason, of the big mess:
ALINA
![Alina](https://imagizer.imageshack.com/img924/3106/wtDGlU.png)
A cute and friendly girl, she joined Ponytail Sluts to pay off the debts of her dad, supporting her family. Cute, isn't it?
But recently, she went missing...

1- Maki is brutally choked by her angry dealer in the bathroom (you went inside)
2- Maki tried to run, but you keep an eye on her (bastard pov?)
3- This time, you decided to not be a dick!
4- Plot twist, Maki serves you coffee (she is also a barista, lol)
5- Back to the club, Maki sold her drugs and has money to share
6- She is expecting you to buy her a drink

Special 2 fempovs, you are also one of Ponytail Whores:

Back to any pov:

11- She kidnapped you and tied HERSELF asking you to rape her (don't hate me, it's a roleplay)
